title: Senior Backend Developer
description: About Position We are passionate about building, testing, and learning. And now we’re looking for Senior Software Engineers who are passionate as much as we are about building travel solutions that provide actual value to millions of people globally. As a Senior Software Engineer, you'll take on responsibility for the development of a number of products and features while working closely with other engineers, designers, product managers, and QA engineers. You will break down complex problems into steps that drive project planning and execution. You will be responsible for delivering implementation excellence and innovation within your product delivery team. As part of a tech company growing quickly, high performers can expect extensive opportunities for progression and development. Responsibilities Coding. Writing high-quality robust code including tests. Most of our engineers release code to production every few days and we have a daily release cycle. Take the lead on design and development of features and products. Mentor and lead more junior developers. Take responsibility for the quality of the code produced by you and the team. Design and develop reusable libraries, APIs and code that are easy to maintain, understand and re-use. Operate across our evolving technology stack - we’re developing with Microsoft .NET Core, SQL Server. Take responsibility for all aspects of software engineering, from design to implementation, QA and maintenance. Touch code at every level – from the UI, through backend microservices and down to the database. Collaborate closely with product, design and QA teams to define feature specifications and develop high-quality deliverables for our clients. Contribute to the evolution of best practices of the Backend Engineering Chapter. Learn new technologies and keep abreast of existing technologies and be able to apply these to your work. Write, review and take responsibility for clear, concise and comprehensive technical documentation. Work alongside other engineering groups located around the world - We are planning to expand with our new offices globally. Skills and Experience At least 6 years’ experience of commercial software development, including leadership experience. Computer Science/Engineering degree or equivalent experience. Strong understanding of software engineering fundamentals i.e. algorithms, data structures, object-oriented programming and design. Strong understanding of database technologies i.e. RDMS, NoSql and querying. Extensive experience in software development with Microsoft .NET C#, ASP.NET MVC, WCF, ASP.NET Web API Experience with web front-end technologies (HTML, CSS, JS) A solid understanding of security principles and secure coding. Experience and understanding of Continuous Integration, Continuous Delivery and Agile Methodologies (Scrum, Kanban) Proficiency in writing good quality object-oriented code using that is simple, fast under load and robust Ability to design and query relational databases and deal with a large amount of data. Willingness and ability to take on new technologies. Ability to break down complex problems into simple solutions. Strong analytical skills and desire to write clean, correct and efficient code. High quality verbal and written communication skills. Sense of ownership, urgency and pride in your work. Background in developing scalable code for high-volume systems. Solid understanding of asynchronous systems and messaging for example RabbitMQ Quality first mind-set for writing code using techniques such as TDD or BDD Major plus Software development experience in the travel industry Experience of working on large enterprise applications Experience of working on finance systems. Experience of working with Jira, Confluence. Solid understanding of cloud technologies such as Azure/AWS and container technologies such as Docker What we offer Chance to be a part of a passionate and driven team where everyone’s ideas are valued Competitive salary and bonus based on performance Opportunity to make an impact on millions of global users' life Opportunity to learn and develop new skills from very experienced team leaders Private health insurance package Great office and working environment, any computer setup that you need to deliver your best work Access to educational materials and online/class training Snacks, drinks, and surprise office treats Interview Process Initial call with HR (30mins) First Interview with Hiring Manager (60mins). Onsite/Online technical interviews with senior technical members of the team (2 sessions, 90mins/session) Behavioural Interview (60mins) Let's shape the future of travel together! https://www.gordiontech.com/kisisel-verilerin-korunmasi-ve-islenmesi-aydinlatma-metni/

title: Senior Laravel Developer
description: About DigiFist At DigiFist , we build scalable SaaS products for e-commerce. One of our key initiatives is a Galantis, a suite of e-commerce connectors & WhatsApp marketing platform with multiple modules, tightly integrated with Shopify. We’re looking for a strong Senior Developer who can take ownership and help us build a robust, scalable product foundation. What you’ll do As a Senior Laravel Developer , you’ll work on the core backend of our SaaS applications and help design a platform built for scale. Build and maintain production-grade Laravel backends (API-first) Design and implement complex integrations (Shopify, external services, webhooks, queues, event-driven flows) Contribute to architecture decisions (scalability, security, performance, maintainability) Develop modular systems across multiple product modules Collaborate with frontend teams using React to deliver clean end-to-end user flows Write clean code, perform code reviews, and uphold engineering standards (tests, CI/CD, best practices) Who we’re looking for (must-haves) You’re truly senior: you don’t just “code”—you design, think ahead, and deliver reliably. 3+ years of hands-on experience with Laravel/PHP in production Proven track record across multiple Laravel projects , with clear ownership and impact Strong experience with complex system integrations (APIs, OAuth, webhooks, third-party services) Solid knowledge of queues/jobs , caching, and performance optimization Strong understanding of database design (migrations, indexing, scalable data structures) Great communication, ownership mindset, and ability to work independently Nice-to-haves (big plus) Comfortable with React (able to collaborate closely; optionally pick up frontend tasks when needed) Experience building Shopify apps (GraphQL/REST, App Bridge, webhooks, billing is a plus) Experience with messaging/automation ecosystems (WhatsApp providers, marketing automation concepts) DevOps mindset: Docker, CI/CD, monitoring, logging Experience with multi-tenant SaaS, modular monoliths, or microservices Tech stack (indicative) Laravel / PHP , MySQL or PostgreSQL Background jobs / queues (e.g., Redis), events & webhooks React frontend and API integrations Shopify integration + distributed app store structure What we offer High-impact work on a product with real complexity and ownership Direct influence on architecture and roadmap A pragmatic team focused on quality + execution Hybrid/remote flexibility Competitive compensation (depending on freelance vs permanent setup) How to apply Please send: your LinkedIn/GitHub/portfolio a short note about the most complex Laravel integration you built (what was hard, what you owned, how you solved it)

title: Aday Mühendis (Full Stack)
description: BTB Tech olarak, ODTÜ Teknokent bünyesinde faaliyet gösteren ve kurumsal şirketler için yapay zeka destekli yazılım ürünleri geliştiren bir teknoloji girişimiyiz. Geliştirdiğimiz AI Nucleus platformu; kurumların dokümanlarını, bilgi havuzlarını ve kurumsal iş akışlarını yapay zeka ile daha erişilebilir ve verimli hale getirmeyi amaçlayan bir Enterprise AI ürünüdür. Ekibimize katılacak bir Aday Mühendis arıyoruz. Bu pozisyon klasik bir staj veya kısa süreli mühendislik deneyimi değildir. Aradığımız kişi, gerçek müşteriler tarafından kullanılan bir ürünün geliştirilmesinde aktif rol alacak, ürün kararlarına katkı sağlayacak ve başarılı olması durumunda BTB Tech'in uzun vadeli teknik ekibinde yer alma fırsatı elde edecektir. Görevler AI Nucleus platformunun geliştirilmesine katkı sağlamak React / Next.js tabanlı modern kullanıcı arayüzleri geliştirmek Python (FastAPI) ve Node.js servisleri geliştirmek ERP, PLM, CLM ve Outlook entegrasyon modüllerinin geliştirilmesine destek olmak Yönetim paneli ve kullanıcı deneyimi geliştirmeleri yapmak API tasarımı ve entegrasyon süreçlerinde görev almak Hata analizi, bakım ve performans iyileştirme çalışmalarına katkı sağlamak Enterprise seviyede doküman yönetimi ve yapay zeka çözümlerinin geliştirilmesinde görev almak Aranan Nitelikler Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Yazılım Mühendisliği veya ilgili bölümlerde öğrenim görüyor olmak Yazılım geliştirmeyi kariyer hedefi olarak görmek GitHub üzerinde geliştirilmiş projelere sahip olmak React, Next.js, Python veya Node.js teknolojilerinden en az birinde deneyim sahibi olmak Problem çözmeye ve yeni teknolojiler öğrenmeye istekli olmak Takım çalışmasına yatkın olmak Teknik doküman okuyabilecek seviyede İngilizce bilgisine sahip olmak Tercih Sebepleri FastAPI deneyimi TypeScript bilgisi PostgreSQL deneyimi Docker veya Linux bilgisi Yapay zeka uygulamaları veya LLM entegrasyonlarına ilgi Kurumsal sistemler (ERP, CRM, PLM vb.) hakkında bilgi sahibi olmak Açık kaynak projelere katkı sağlamış olmak Seni Neler Bekliyor? Gerçek müşterilere hizmet veren bir yapay zeka ürününün geliştirilmesinde aktif rol alma fırsatı Enterprise yazılım geliştirme süreçlerini deneyimleme imkanı Yapay zeka, RAG ve kurumsal entegrasyon projelerinde çalışma fırsatı ODTÜ Teknokent ekosisteminde yer alma ve girişimcilik ortamını deneyimleme şansı Deneyimli mühendislerle birlikte çalışma ve mentorluk desteği Ürün geliştirme kararlarında söz sahibi olma fırsatı Hibrit çalışma modeli (ODTÜ Teknokent + Uzaktan) Esnek çalışma kültürü Başarılı performans durumunda uzun dönemli çalışma ve tam zamanlı istihdam değerlendirmesi
